title: Swing-trade fact ledger
description: Per-candidate / per-position fact ledger for Claude1. Phase 1 of the swing-risk-compliance-doctrine 4-phase path: deterministic fact storage with per-section fetched_at timestamps. Conclusions (setup classification, sell decisions, etc.) MUST cite reasoning_trace entries that reference deterministic tool outputs. The agent never re-derives values that appear in this ledger.

sell_eval_history.description: Append-only history of sell-trigger evaluations. One entry per evaluation (typically daily on open positions). v1-preliminary: revisit after Minervini book v2 ingestion of swing-sell-discipline.md.

reasoning_trace.description: Append-only numbered list of tool outputs that conclusions in this ledger cite. Each conclusion in a setup_classification / position_state / sell_eval entry MUST reference one or more reasoning_trace steps by integer id. Per swing-risk-compliance-doctrine Requirement 3 (unfaithful-reasoning detection).

notes.description: Free-text scratchpad. Not load-bearing. Anything load-bearing must move into a structured field.

source_tag.description: Where this datum came from. Free string but follow conventions: broker_api, sec_filing, earnings_release, web:<domain>, tool:<tool_name>, manual.

schema_version.description: Ledger schema version. Bump when the structure changes; existing ledgers stay on the version they were written under.

asof.description: The point in time this ledger snapshot represents. For candidates: the moment trade-researcher built the candidate report. For positions: the last update timestamp.

state.description: Lifecycle state. candidate=pre-trade research; rejected=did not pass risk-and-compliance; submitted=auto-paper order placed but not yet filled (paper-auto track only); starter/stage-2/stage-3=open and at the named pyramid stage per swing-momentum-execution; trailing=full size, no further adds, normal trail; closed=exited.

account_track.description: Which track owns this position. Absent = human (default; back-compat with pre-2026-05-24 ledgers). paper-auto = autonomous paper-trading track (validation-only, no live capital). Track separation keeps existing tooling (check-positions, news-research Scout, EOD sell-eval) untouched in v1 — those read journal/positions.json which only contains human-track positions.

ledger_path.description: Self-reference relative path. e.g. ledgers/candidates/2026-05-17/AAPL.yml. Set on creation; never changes.

created_by.description: Which agent or skill created this ledger. e.g. trade-researcher, risk-and-compliance, manual.

notes.description: Append-only audit-trail entries on this ledger's lifecycle. Each entry records a discrete operator/script event (trim, manual close, screener-retro disqualification, etc.). Distinct from the top-level free-text `notes` field at the ledger root. Added 2026-05-28 after the GO trim script's audit-trail entry caused refresh_starter_stops to fail schema validation silently.

event.description: Short kebab-case event tag. e.g. discretionary_trim, manual_close, screener_retro_block, ledger_resync.

session.description: Market session at fetch time. Stale-during-regular rules differ from stale-during-closed.

fundamentals.description: Fundamental data. Per Requirement 4 (temporal context): the filing_date is what gates 'stale' — if the next earnings is due, the post-fact figures here are about to change.

eps_yoy_growth.description: Decimal fraction. 0.21 = 21%. Computed by tools/compute_yoy.py in Phase 2; until then, populate from broker/filing and flag the source.

eps_surprise_pct.description: Decimal fraction. 0.10 = beat by 10%. Negative = miss.

next_earnings_date.description: Per CLAUDE.md hard rule: no entries within 10 trading days of earnings unless that's the explicit thesis (EP setup).

next_earnings_source_secondary.description: Per trade-researcher working principle 1: verify earnings dates against TWO independent sources before stating one.

technical.description: Technical state of the candidate stock. The 8-point Trend Template fields drive Stage classification per swing-regime-playbook Level 3.

ma200_rising_months.description: How many months the 200-day MA has been rising. Minervini prefers >= 4-5.

rs_rating.description: IBD-style relative strength. Trend Template prefers >= 70.

trend_template_passes.description: Count of the 8 Trend Template criteria passing for this stock.

stage.description: Weinstein stage analysis classification 1–4. Only Stage 2 qualifies for long entries per swing-regime-playbook.

atr_14.description: 14-period ATR in $. Used by position_sizer.py to derive stop distance per swing-position-sizing.

adr_20_pct.description: 20-day Average Daily Range as percent of price. Kullamägi's stop sizing input.

volume_today_vs_20d_avg.description: Ratio. 1.5 = 50% above 20-day average. Setup-confluence input for VCP breakout and Momentum Burst.

regime.description: Three-level regime check per swing-regime-playbook. Stage 4 broad market = no new entries (circuit breaker).

broad_market_trend_template_passes.description: Score 0-7 against the broad-market trend template (RS criterion skipped for indices).

sector_qualifies_for_long.description: True iff sector >= 5/7. False eliminates the candidate per Level 2.

regime_multiplier.description: Per swing-position-sizing: 1.0 stage_2_confirmed, 0.75 stage_2_weakening, 0.5 stage_3_transitional, 0 stage_4.

setup_classification.description: Per swing-setup-library: a candidate trade is tagged with exactly one setup type plus a grade. Grading shape depends on type (SEPA-VCP uses A+/A/B/C; EP uses Super Swan / Swan / Duck / Chicken / Golden EP).

type.description: Named setup tag. Manual is reserved for the portfolio-manager onboard mode (pre-framework positions imported retroactively) — risk-and-compliance morning-routine paths should never accept type=Manual at entry; only the onboard path emits it. The KIND_REGISTRY family (dual_ma_trend_following, xs_short_term_reversal, connors_rsi2, clenow_momentum) was added 2026-05-26 to allow tools/auto_paper/quant_scanner.py to write submitted-state ledgers for cleared quant strategies. The _liquid_us variants (clenow_momentum_liquid_us, residual_momentum_liquid_us, xs_short_term_reversal_liquid_us, ts_momentum_liquid_us) were added 2026-05-26 evening for the wide-universe deployable family — same kinds, different universe spec, so they get distinct setup_type values for ledger-level traceability.

grade.description: Grade per the grading scale appropriate to the setup type. SEPA-VCP / Pullback / RSI-Div / Resistance-Break use {A+, A, B, C}. EP uses {SuperSwan, Swan, Duck, Chicken, GoldenEP}.

confluence_checklist.description: Per-criterion pass/fail with evidence. Each criterion ties back to a setup-library or earnings-pivot named requirement.

evidence.description: One-line evidence with the value. e.g. 'eps_yoy=0.21'.

trace_refs.description: List of reasoning_trace step IDs that produced this evidence. EMPTY = unfaithful by Requirement 3 — risk-and-compliance will downgrade or BLOCK.

pivot_price.description: Entry trigger price. For SEPA-VCP: top of final contraction. For EP: opening range high. For Pullback: reversal-candle high. For RSI-Div: confirmation candle high. For Resistance-Break: resistance level.

stop_distance_pct.description: (pivot_price - stop_price) / pivot_price. Must be <= 0.08 per Minervini cap. Computed by tools/stop_sizer.py in Phase 2.

trace_refs.description: Reasoning trace IDs supporting the overall classification (type + grade).

catalyst.description: The 'A' (Announcement) leg of SEPA. Also drives EP setup. Per swing-setup-library: vague AI/cloud tailwind without specific company application does NOT qualify.

source_secondary_url.description: Optional second source. Strongly recommended for earnings catalysts.

verified.description: True iff a deterministic source URL has been fetched and confirmed. Phase 1 = manual confirmation; Phase 2+ may automate.

ep_specific.description: Fields populated only when setup_classification.type == 'EP'. Per swing-earnings-pivot operational guide.

gap_pct.description: Open gap as decimal. 0.10 = 10%. Threshold: >= 0.10 for EP eligibility.

first_30min_volume_vs_adv.description: Ratio. Best EPs trade their full ADV in first 15-30 min.

prior_rally_3m_pct.description: Decimal. EP filter: stock should NOT have rallied past 3-6 months.

magna_score.description: Massive earnings / After-hours gap / Gap up confirmed / Neglected / Analyst upgrades. 5/5 = Golden EP candidate.

ep_grade.description: Mirror of setup_classification.grade when type==EP. Stored separately for query convenience.

mandatory_exit_date.description: Per swing-earnings-pivot mandatory rule: exit before next quarterly earnings.

position_state.description: Lifecycle state for an open position. Populated when meta.state is starter/stage-2/stage-3/trailing/closed. Per swing-momentum-execution Anchor-and-Pyramid three-stage workflow.

intended_full_shares.description: Target full-size share count this position is aiming for. STARTER = 1/3 of this; Stage-2 = full; Stage-3 = 1.5x.

intended_full_capital_pct.description: Capital % the full position represents. Caps per swing-position-sizing apply.

risk_budget_pct.description: Account-risk budget % for this position. Per swing-position-sizing table: A+ SEPA / SuperSwan / GoldenEP = 2.0%, A/Swan = 1.5%, etc.

combined_breakeven.description: Weighted-average entry across all filled legs. The stop after ADD-ON #1 migrates to this value. Computed by tools/combined_breakeven.py in Phase 2.

stop_order_id.description: Broker-side global order ID for the active protective stop, when one is resting at the broker. Populated by tools.auto_paper.reconcile after submitted->starter transition (Session 3); cleared by tools.auto_paper.exits when the position closes and the stop is cancelled. Absent for human-track positions or paper-auto positions before a stop has been placed.

trail_ma.description: Trailing mechanism currently in force. Tightens over time per swing-momentum-execution stop-migration table; never widens.

trail_state_legacy.description: Mirror of journal/positions.json v1 trail_state for backward compatibility with scripts/check-positions.ps1 until that script is updated.

alerts_sent.description: Alert keys already fired so reminder scripts don't spam. Mirror of v1 alerts_sent.

trigger.description: Which mechanical trigger this leg fired on. Per swing-momentum-execution. QuantSignal added 2026-05-26 for KIND_REGISTRY quant scanner entries (dual_ma / xs_reversal / connors_rsi2 / clenow_momentum).

broker_order_id.description: Broker-side global order ID, if the entry was placed via tools.broker.tiger.TigerClient.place_limit_buy. Optional — manual fills leave this null.

broker.description: Which broker route produced this fill. Optional; absence implies manual.

sell_eval_entry.description: Single daily sell-trigger evaluation per swing-sell-discipline. v1-preliminary: revisit after Minervini book v2 ingestion.

climax_top_patterns_firing.description: Count of the 6 climax-top patterns firing today per swing-sell-discipline Trigger #1. v1-preliminary.

violations_firing.description: Count of the 5 breakout violations firing per swing-sell-discipline Trigger #2. v1-preliminary.

base_stage.description: O'Neil/Minervini base-count stage. 4th/5th-stage new-highs = exit signal per Trigger #3.

sell_into_strength_triggered.description: True iff position up 10-15% in 2-3 days with no further catalyst pending. 3-school convergent rule.

action.description: Recommended action from sell_decision.py. In Phase 1 this is recorded manually; in Phase 2 the tool decides.

trace_refs.description: Reasoning-trace IDs supporting this sell evaluation. EMPTY = unfaithful by Requirement 3.

v1_preliminary_flag.description: Set true while swing-sell-discipline is in v1. Permits sells to fire on incomplete rules but marks them for v2 retrospective review.

trace_step.description: Single numbered tool-output entry. Conclusions elsewhere in the ledger cite the id. Phase 1: populated manually as a contract; Phase 2 onward: emitted by the tool itself.

id.description: Stable monotonically-increasing integer within this ledger.

tool.description: Tool that produced this output. e.g. tools/trend_template.py, tools/ep_detect.py, tools/position_sizer.py. Use 'manual:<source>' for Phase 1 manual entries.

inputs.description: Inputs the tool was called with. Keeps the trace re-runnable.

output.description: Tool output. Can be any JSON-serializable shape — number, string, object, array.
